2604.11514.title: DuET: Dual Execution for Test Output Prediction with Generated Code and Pseudocode
2604.11514.paper_summary: This work addresses test output prediction, a key challenge in test case generation. To improve the reliability of predicted outputs by LLMs, prior approaches generate code first to ground predictions. One grounding strategy is direct execution of generated code, but even minor errors can cause failures. To address this, we introduce LLM-based pseudocode execution, which grounds prediction on more error-resilient pseudocode and simulates execution via LLM reasoning. We further propose DuET, a dual-execution framework that combines both approaches by functional majority voting. Our analysis shows the two approaches are complementary in overcoming the limitations of direct execution suffering from code errors, and pseudocode reasoning from hallucination. On LiveCodeBench, DuET achieves the state-of-the-art performance, improving Pass@1 by 13.6 pp.
2604.11514.paper_summary_zh: 這項工作針對測試輸出預測，這是測試案例生成中的一個關鍵挑戰。<lb/>為了提高 LLM 預測輸出的可靠性，以前的方法首先生成代碼以支持預測。<lb/>一種支持策略是直接執行生成的代碼，但即使是微小的錯誤也可能導致失敗。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們引入了基於 LLM 的偽代碼執行，它基於更具錯誤韌性的偽代碼來支持預測，並通過 LLM 推理模擬執行。<lb/>我們進一步提出了 DuET，一個通過功能多數投票結合這兩種方法的雙重執行框架。<lb/>我們的分析顯示，這兩種方法在克服直接執行因代碼錯誤而受限和偽代碼推理因幻覺而受限方面是互補的。<lb/>在 LiveCodeBench 上，DuET 實現了最先進的性能，提高了 Pass@1 13.6 個百分點。
2604.11514.author: Hojae Han et.al.
2604.11514.authors: Hojae Han, Jaejin Kim, Seung-won Hwang, Yu Jin Kim, Moontae Lee
